87 G1IA G1IA_SELF_TOLIET 23dA(G1iA)Toilet Use - Self Performance CHAR 1 Indicates how the patient without assistance uses the toilet room, commode, bedpan, or urinal, transfers on/off toilet, cleanses, changes pad, manages ostomy or catheter, and adjusts clothes. -1 = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision -
